role: Defines the architectural governance rules and naming conventions that enforce consistency and layering in ArchSpine-governed codebases.
responsibility: Enforces layered architecture constraints to prevent dependency violations and establishes mandatory naming conventions (e.g., interface prefix, test file suffixes) for automated validation and consistent code style.

children.role: Architectural governance rules that define and enforce the layered architecture constraints for the ArchSpine repository.
Defines mandatory naming convention rules for ArchSpine-governed codebases to enforce style consistency and automated validation.
